Case# NSFileProviderManager.EligibilityResult.ineligible(_:)

macOS 15.0+

```
case ineligible(NSFileProviderVolumeUnsupportedReason)
```

## [See Also](/documentation/fileprovider/nsfileprovidermanager/eligibilityresult/ineligible(_:)#see-also)

### [Determining eligibility](/documentation/fileprovider/nsfileprovidermanager/eligibilityresult/ineligible(_:)#Determining-eligibility)

[`case eligible`](/documentation/fileprovider/nsfileprovidermanager/eligibilityresult/eligible)[`struct NSFileProviderVolumeUnsupportedReason`](/documentation/fileprovider/nsfileprovidervolumeunsupportedreason)Constants that describe why an external volume might not be eligible for storing a domain.
